name: seo-article-audit
description: Diagnose why an AIHR article lost organic traffic and whether SEO salvage is viable. Reads the article, checks Outline history, derives keyword candidates, pulls worldwide and US-only GSC data plus Ahrefs facts, runs Chrome-based factual SERP observation with AI Overview summaries, and recommends strategy before optimization. Bundles serp-analysis (US SERP facts), article-diff-md (red/green diffs), and outline-article-refresh-memory (monthly Outline updates during refresh).
